title: Employer Research, Opportunity Quality, and Scam Defense · Hiring Decision Lens: Risk Response
summary: An urgent remote offer uses a recognizable logo, personal email, text interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently verifiable team. Predict the hiring decision, evidence quality, affected people, uncertainty, and ethical boundary before reviewing a model. Planned artifact: Add and verify the risk response increment in opportunity trust and risk dossier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defens…
objectives: Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact.
Investigate management, onboarding, team work, accessibility, inclusion, security, on-call, workload, turnover, measurement, and growth through behavior questions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# job-search cumulative learner-controlled career campaign
# Browser labs review fictional evidence contracts only. They never contact people,
# submit applications, access accounts, expose personal data, negotiate, or accept offers.
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-learner
target-role: [replace with role family, work outcomes, and bounded level]
jurisdiction: [replace with location and current official guidance boundary]
audience: [replace with reviewer need, time, format, and access context]
claim: [replace with one truthful role-relevant behavior claim]
evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, observation, changed case, contribution, and limit]
process-state: [replace with discover, investigate, apply, interview, offer, close, or archive]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
privacy-consent: [replace with purpose, minimization, permission, retention, deletion, and safe contact]
decision: [replace with learner-owned next decision and stop rule]
transfer-boundary: learner-approved external actions only
review:

steps.title: Predict Risk Response · Theory Risk Response
steps.instruction:
theory case — An urgent remote offer uses a personal address, text-only interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently confirmed role or recruiter. The theory variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact.

Before reading, predict which action preserves the Risk Response contract for the supplied data.

Evidence target: Predict Risk Response · Theory Risk Response.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact. For Predict Risk Response · Theory Risk Response, keep Risk Response connected to mechanically reviewable target-role, truthful-claim, contribution, accessibility, privacy, consent, process-state, changed-candidate, failure, repair, decision, and transfer evidence.

content.title: Reasoning move
content.text: Name learner goal, target role, jurisdiction, audience, claim, contribution, source date, evidence revision, accessibility, privacy, consent, process state, changed candidate, rejected failure, causal repair, decision owner, non-claim, and transfer limit; then calibrate the application or career decision to that exact evidence.

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: An urgent remote offer uses a personal address, text-only interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently confirmed role or recruiter. The worked example variation 5 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact. A defensible solution applies Risk Response, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to opportunity trust and risk dossier.

content.code:
workspace: career
candidate-id: fictional-candidate-2
target-role: accessible software quality engineer
jurisdiction: example location requiring current official review
audience: technical reviewer with ten minutes and keyboard-only access
claim: one bounded role behavior is supported by a revision-linked changed case
evidence: repository case study, exact test result, contribution note, and limitation
process-state: investigate before applying
accessibility: structured text, reflow, visible focus, plain-language status, and equivalent format
privacy-consent: publish no sensitive person or third-party data; contact only with explicit consent
decision: proceed only after identity, role, evidence, access, and risk checks pass
verify: inspect links, extraction order, revision, changed case, disclosure, and source date
failure: reject invented impact, hidden assistance, exposed data, or unverified recruiter identity
repair: correct the first unsupported claim and add a changed-candidate regression
owner: learner controls every external action
transfer-boundary: manual learner-approved profile, application, conversation, interview, and offer decisions
content.caption: Runnable transformation example; predict its result before running, then change one boundary input.

steps.title: Defend the Risk Response model · Theory Risk Response
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Risk Response: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — An urgent remote offer uses a personal address, text-only interview, early identity request, equipment check, and no independently confirmed role or recruiter. The theory variation 6 changes the candidate background, target role, jurisdiction, access need, source date, process state, and decision constraint. Competency probe: Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Pause, preserve non-sensitive evidence, verify, refuse, report through appropriate channels, secure affected accounts, and document uncertainty after suspicious contact.
